en: I want to tell you what I see coming.
ko: 내가 보이는 미래에 대해 이야기하고 싶어.
ja: これから起こることを皆さんに伝えたい
zhTW: 我想告訴你們我看到即將發生的事
vi: Toi muon noi cho cac ban biet dieu toi thay sap xay ra

en: I've been lucky enough to be working on AI for almost 15 years now.
ko: 나는 거의 15년 동안 AI에 대해 일할 수 있는 행운을 누렸어.
ja: もうほぼ15年AIに取り組んでいる
zhTW: 我很幸運能在AI領域工作將近15年了
vi: Toi may man duoc lam viec ve AI gan 15 nam roi

en: Back when I started, to describe it as fringe would be an understatement.
ja: マイナーと言うのは控えめすぎるくらいだった
zhTW: 說它是邊緣都是輕描淡寫
vi: goi no la le loi thi con nhe

en: Researchers would say, no, no, we're only working on machine learning,
ja: いやいや、我々は機械学習をやってるだけだ
zhTW: 不不，我們只是在做機器學習
vi: khong khong, chung toi chi lam hoc may thoi

en: because working on AI was seen as way too out there.
ko: AI에 대한 연구는 너무 비현실적으로 여겨졌거든.
ja: AIに取り組むのは行き過ぎと見なされていた
zhTW: 因為做AI被認為太超前了
vi: vi lam AI bi coi la qua vien vong

en: In 2010, just the very mention of the phrase AGI, artificial general intelligence,
ja: 2010年にはAGIという言葉を口にするだけで
vi: Vao nam 2010, chi can nhac den cum tu AGI

en: would get you some seriously strange looks and even a cold shoulder.
ja: 真剣に変な目で見られた
zhTW: 就會被用很奇怪的眼神看
vi: se bi nhin rat ky la

en: You're actually building AGI, people would say.
ko: 너는 실제로 AGI를 만들고 있다고 사람들이 말했지.
ja: AGIを本当に作ってるの？と言われた
zhTW: 你們真的在建造AGI？人們會說
vi: Ban dang thuc su xay dung AGI a? moi nguoi se noi

en: Isn't that something out of science fiction? People thought it was 50 years away or 100 years away,
ko: 그게 과학 소설에서나 나올 법한 일이 아닌가?
ja: 50年後か100年後だと思われていた
zhTW: 人們認為那是50年或100年後的事
vi: Moi nguoi nghi no con 50 nam hoac 100 nam nua

en: if it was even possible at all. Talk of AI was, I guess, kind of embarrassing.
ja: AIの話は恥ずかしいことだった
vi: Noi ve AI khi do kha xau ho

en: People generally thought we were weird. And I guess in some ways, we kind of were.
ja: ある意味、確かにそうだった
zhTW: 我想在某些方面，我們確實有點怪
vi: Va toi nghi theo mot so cach, chung toi dung la vay

en: It wasn't long, though, before AI started beating humans at a whole range of tasks
ja: AIがさまざまなタスクで人間に勝ち始めた
zhTW: AI就開始在一系列任務上打敗人類了
vi: AI bat dau danh bai con nguoi trong nhieu nhiem vu
